content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Personal Information Updates | Stanford Student Services

  - url: https://studentservices.stanford.edu/my-information/personal-information-updates

  - source: Stanford Student Services

  - domain: studentservices.stanford.edu


  ## Content


  # Personal Information Updates


  Active students may update their personal information at any time. Some updates
  may be completed through Axess self-service, while other updates require staff assistance.
  Graduated or discontinued students are unable to update their personal information
  with the university through this active-student process.


  ## Make these updates yourself


  Students can update the following information in Axess. Log in to Axess and use
  the **My Information** menu:


  - Address

  - Email address

  - Emergency contact

  - Ethnicity

  - Preferred name

  - Privacy settings

  - Pronouns

  - Social Security Number or Individual Taxpayer Identification Number


  A correction to a Social Security Number or Individual Taxpayer Identification Number
  that was already submitted requires an appointment with the Student Services Center.


  ### Preferred name


  A preferred name may be different from the legal name of record. The preferred name
  is used as the display name in several campus systems and appears on documents such
  as the unofficial transcript. Students may update their preferred name in Axess.
  They may also need to update related systems, such as email, Gradescope, or Zoom,
  separately.


  ## Request these updates


  Students must request staff assistance to update the following personal-information
  fields:


  - Primary name or legal name of record

  - Date of birth

  - Marital status

  - Sex


  The primary or legal name of record is the name that appears, for example, on an
  official transcript or enrollment certification.


  To update one or more of these staff-assisted fields, complete the **Personal Information
  Update** request form provided by Stanford Student Services.

  '

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: I''m a student, why can''t I change any of my directory information in
  StanfordYou?

  - url: https://uit.stanford.edu/service/stanfordyou/instructions/student-info

  - source: Stanford University IT

  - domain: uit.stanford.edu


  ## Content


  # I''m a student, why can''t I change any of my directory information in StanfordYou?


  Most student information is managed by the Registrar and maintained through Axess.


  Within StanfordYou, students can enter additional names for searching, such as nicknames,
  and add a web address to their directory listing. Students can also manage their
  account information in StanfordYou.


  Students who need more information about changing student personal information should
  refer to the **Personal Information Updates** guidance on the Stanford Student Services
  website.


  Last modified June 11, 2026.

  '
metadata: {}
title: I'm a student, why can't I change any of my directory information in StanfordYou?
url: https://uit.stanford.edu/service/stanfordyou/instructions/student-info

For an **active Stanford student**, updating your **legal/primary name of record** requires staff assistance—it cannot be changed directly in Axess or StanfordYou.

### What to do
1. Open Stanford Student Services’ **[Personal Information Updates](https://studentservices.stanford.edu/my-information/personal-information-updates)** page.
2. Complete the **Personal Information Update** request form for “Primary name or legal name of record.”
3. The updated legal name should then appear on official records such as your transcript or enrollment certification.

You can update a **preferred name** yourself in Axess under **My Information**, but that is separate from changing your legal name. Stanford’s Registrar manages most student information through Axess, while StanfordYou is not the place to change the official student record.

final_answer:
For an **active Stanford student**, updating your **legal/primary name of record** requires staff assistance—it cannot be changed directly in Axess or StanfordYou.

### What to do
1. Open Stanford Student Services’ **[Personal Information Updates](https://studentservices.stanford.edu/my-information/personal-information-updates)** page.
2. Complete the **Personal Information Update** request form for “Primary name or legal name of record.”
3. The updated legal name should then appear on official records such as your transcript or enrollment certification.

You can update a **preferred name** yourself in Axess under **My Information**, but that is separate from changing your legal name. Stanford’s Registrar manages most student information through Axess, while StanfordYou is not the place to change the official student record.
